items.title: True Classic Mens T-Shirts – Short Sleeve Crew Neck T Shirts for Man, Cotton Blend Plain Novelty Men's T-Shirts
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: true, mens, shirts, crew, neck, man, cotton, blend, plain. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
